calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Continued To Jul-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff John Does Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Davis Wang, PLC's motion to preclude plaintiff from proceeding by way of a pseudonym and to strike the PTSD allegations in the complaint is denied. Plaintiff's assertion that his mental health would be compromised by the use of his true name is, without contradicting facts, sufficient to show extraordinary circumstances permitting his proceeding by way of a pseudonym. The PTSD allegations, while not strictly necessary to any of plaintiff's claims, are relevant background information for those claims. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint / Joinder
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY DAVIS' Joinder in Defendant Davis Wang LLC's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Complaint is off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion sought to be joined. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/HK)
